description: F4.1 — RESTRICTED mapping for Lite mode. Strict 1-a-1 between each PrimaryEmotion and a single canonical probe from the 171-emotion library. Trades expressiveness for predictability and lower runtime overhead. RESIDUUMREWORK.txt Section 8: Lite mode caps steering at 0.08 and uses this map.
criteria: For each PrimaryEmotion choose the single probe whose VAD-C is closest to the Pathos profile in engine/generator.py EMOTION_PROFILES, prioritizing probes that appear in the STANDARD composite as the head element.
